hero.headline: About Peerless Brokerage Inc
hero.subline: 25 years of independent insurance expertise, working for clients — not insurance companies.

story.headline: Our Story
story.body: Peerless Brokerage was founded in 1999 with a simple mission: give Brooklyn families and businesses the same access to insurance options that large corporations enjoy. As an independent broker, we represent you — not any single insurance company.

milestones.text: Expanded to commercial and TLC insurance

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.body: We believe every family and business deserves access to the best insurance options at the best price. As independent brokers, we shop multiple carriers on your behalf — so you never overpay or under-protect.

pillars.title: Independent Advice
pillars.text: We work for you, not the insurance company.

pillars.title: Best Rate
pillars.text: We shop 30+ carriers to find the lowest price for your coverage.

pillars.title: Local Expertise
pillars.text: We know Brooklyn, Queens, and the NYC market inside and out.

licenses.headline: Licenses & Credentials
licenses.disclaimer: E&O insurance holder. All licenses verified and in good standing.

carriers.headline: Carrier Partners
carriers.subline: We work with the best carriers to give you the most options

cta.headline: Ready to Work with Peerless?
cta.subline: Get a free quote today and see how much you can save.
